title: CursedCraft
description: CursedCraft adds new strange and sometimes even broken recipes to the game.
body:
# CursedCraft 

### CursedCraft adds new strange and sometimes even broken recipes to the game. 
Check gallery for more detailed information.

To get all the items write `/function cursedcraft:allitems`

## Crafts

<details>
<summary>Spawners</summary>

- ### Lightning Spawner
![Lightning spawner](https://i.imgur.com/Pp66vs6.png)

- ### Super Effective Ender Pearl Spawner
![Super effective ender pearl spawner](https://i.imgur.com/Zfbnbxg.png)

- ### Evoker Fangs Spawner
![Evoker Fangs Spawner](https://i.imgur.com/bmO24VR.png)

- ### Fire Charge Spawner
![Fire Charge Spawner](https://i.imgur.com/hoi4ALT.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mobs/Entities</summary>

- ### Big Chungus Slime
![Big Chungus Slime](https://i.imgur.com/zY2Qcau.png)

- ### Big Phantom (Tops the list of hate)
![Big Phantom](https://i.imgur.com/DjI9Mvz.png)

- ### Cruuper - Creeper with strong explosion power
![Cruuper ](https://i.imgur.com/NOGwuzY.png)

- ### Ender Dragon
![Ender Dragon](https://i.imgur.com/oP9j8FX.png)

- ### Wither
![Wither](https://i.imgur.com/u13Z0Ig.png)

- ### Giant zombie
![Giant zombie](https://i.imgur.com/FcYeDUe.png)

- ### Lightning
![Lightning](https://i.imgur.com/8UId70B.png)

- ### Arrow With Ender Dragon Death Sound
![Arrow With Ender Dragon Death Sound](https://i.imgur.com/YjRDFdN.png)

- ### Fireball Of Apocalypse - Fireball with strong explosion power
![Fireball Of Apocalypse](https://i.imgur.com/t5vfmv4.png)

- ### Illusioner
![Illusioner](https://i.imgur.com/wrXoXww.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Misc</summary>

- ### Creative killer
![Creative killer](https://i.imgur.com/ZAzFsg6.png)

- ### Super firework
![Super firework](https://i.imgur.com/pUJl7vg.png)

- ### Troll Helmet
![Troll Helmet](https://i.imgur.com/kVp3qIe.png)

- ### Arrow With Infinite Blindness
![Arrow With Infinite Blindness](https://i.imgur.com/W6fV3W1.png)

- ### Anime Gun - super fast crossbow
![Anime Gun](https://i.imgur.com/SKuOT3x.png)

</details>

If you have any ideas please write them [here](https://github.com/Komaru-cats/CursedCraft/issues)
